texto: Animal thoughts are dangerous,’ the woman told her gently. ‘Animals are too wild. Talking to them and looking inside their minds can harm you, because they just want to turn you into one of them. You’re going to have to learn to use your powers responsibly.
explicacao: Orientação direta de L.A. Randomfox sobre temas ligados a sabedoria. A afirmação “Animal thoughts are dangerous,’ the woman told her gently. ‘Animals are too wild. Talking to them…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a sabedoria, nature, wildness, útil em momentos de wildness.
